name: romvault
description: ROMVault — hub de romhacking. Catálogo de jogos, romhacks, traduções, documentos e ferramentas.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @romvault/core && npm run build --workspace @romvault/web
scripts.db:types: npx --yes supabase@latest gen types typescript --linked > packages/core/src/database.types.ts
